item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '60s Mustang Bass - Surf Green, Help Support Small Business and Buy Here! — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Brand New · Capital City Guitars

Squier Classic Vibe '60s Mustang Bass - Surf Green

Serial Number: ISSB26000648

4-string Electric Bass Guitar, with Nato Body, Maple Neck, Indian Laurel Fretboard, and 1 Split Single-coil Pickup - Surf Green

Classic Mustang Punch and Power

Featuring the classic offset Mustang body, the Squier Classic Vibe Mustang Bass '60s four-string bass guitar delivers great looks and tone at a great value. The maple neck with "C"-shaped profile sets a standard for playability, and the addition of a real bone nut enhances tone and tuning stability. The Fender-designed split single-coil pickup with alnico magnets delivers punchy tone for a variety of musical styles. And with its shorter 30" scale length, the Squier Classic Vibe Mustang Bass '60s combines impressive low-end punch with fluid playability.

Fender-designed split single-coil pickup

Squier equips the Classic Vibe Mustang Bass '60s with a Fender-designed split single-coil bass pickup, with alnico magnets for maximum tone. The pickup is positioned to capture the fullest tone from the Mustang Bass, and Volume and Tone controls help you fine-tune your sound.

Classic '60s design

Squier tapped into the iconic design of the original 1966 Fender Mustang to create the Squier Classic Vibe Mustang Bass '60s. You get the classic body with its unique shape and a smooth-playing maple neck. It even sports the original-looking Mustang Bass bridge, with adjustable saddles for adjustable intonation.

While small in stature, the Classic Vibe '60s Mustang® Bass packs a punch of incredible tone courtesy of the Fender-Designed alnico split-coil pickup. Small hands will appreciate the short 30" scale length and slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets. This throwback Squier model also features 1960s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

FEATURES

  • 100% designed by Fender
  • Inspired by 1960s-era Mustang Bass models
  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups
  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish
  • Nickel-plated hardware

Tech Specs

  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed
  • Body Shape:Mustang
  • Body Material:Nato
  • Body Finish:Gloss Polyurethane
  • Color:Surf Green
  • Neck Material:Maple
  • Neck Shape:C
  • Radius:9.5"
  • Fingerboard Material:Indian Laurel
  • Fingerboard Inlay:Dots
  • Number of Frets:20, Narrow Tall
  • Scale Length:30"
  • Nut Width:1.5"
  • Nut Material:Bone
  • Bridge/Tailpiece:4-saddle Vintage-style
  • Tuners:Vintage-style
  • Middle Pickup:Fender-designed Alnico Split Single-coil
  • Controls:1 x master volume, 1 x master tone
  • Strings:NPS, 45s

item.description:
$2,134.55 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

Berry Oakley was the bass player (and one of the founding members) for The Allman Brothers Band. Berry had a very good bass tone, as heard here in Mountain Jam.
Berry did play a Fender Jazz Bass, but it was anything but stock.
Nicknamed the “Tractor Bass”, it was customized with a Guild pickup manufactured by Hagstrom.
This is version with Hathor Walbucker multicoils pickup, Wal2 style preamp by Analogworkshop, Fender Jazz Bass Standard USA neck & customised body by OX BIRD BASS.

item.title: Ibanez 2354LB Double Cutaway Long Scale Bass 1974 - 1977 - Walnut — $1,261.65
item.description:
$1,261.65 · Very Good · Jan Bass Collection

The 2354LB is a solid electric bass guitar model introduced by Ibanez in 1971. It was producedin Japan. It's visually similar to Gibson's EB-0 model.

The 2354LB features a double cut mahogany body with selected bich top bolted to a three-piece maple neck with a medium C profile and a 20-fret ebonized rosewood fingerboard with pearloid dots position markers and an open book headstock. Components include a EB bridge mini-humbucker style at the bridge and a Gibson madbucker style Humbucking pickup on the neck position with individual volume and tone controls and a three-way toggle baritone selector, a Two-point tune-o-matic fixed bridge w/ chrome cover, a small black pickguard with a tug bar, Ibanez tuning machines and chrome hardware

The 2354SB is a similar short scale bass model.

The 2354LB was discontinued after 1977.

It certainly is a great bass. The Japanese models are known for their excellent quality.

The G&L LB-100 made its debut in the early '90s in response to bassists seeking a more subtle evolution of the P-style platform, as compared to the SB-1 and L-1000. With a slightly streamlined body shape for improved comfort and balance, the LB-100 also featured the G&L Saddle Lock bridge for richer note definition and sustain. The Tribute Series LB-100 hits all the marks, with an ideal balance to the pickup for vintage flavor with solid punch.

item.title: Ibanez IV2MDM - Natural #C262104 — $5,999.99
item.description:
$5,999.99 · Brand New · Eddie's Guitars

The Ibanez IV2MDM in Natural is a masterfully crafted five string bass that showcases the precision, innovation, and uncompromising quality for which the Ibanez Japan Custom Shop is renowned. Designed for discerning bassists who demand exceptional playability, tonal versatility, and boutique level craftsmanship, this instrument blends premium tonewoods with advanced electronics and professional grade hardware to create a bass equally at home on stage, in the studio, or wherever inspiration strikes. Finished in a beautiful Natural gloss that highlights the striking Black Limba top, the IV2MDM delivers an elegant appearance that reflects its refined character and meticulous construction.

Its MDM5S TECH WOOD roasted maple neck provides outstanding stability and a remarkably comfortable playing experience, while the roasted treatment enhances resonance and resistance to environmental changes. Paired with a luxurious cocobolo fingerboard featuring understated maple dot inlays, the neck offers exceptional warmth, articulation, and smooth response across all 24 medium stainless steel frets. Ibanez's renowned Custom Shop Fret Edge Treatment ensures every fret is expertly finished for effortless movement and unmatched playing comfort.

The combination of a Black Limba top over an alder body creates a balanced tonal foundation with focused lows, rich midrange presence, and articulate highs. This carefully selected tonewood pairing produces excellent sustain and dynamic response, allowing every note to speak with clarity whether laying down supportive grooves or delivering expressive solo passages.

Equipped with a matched set of passive Delta S5J pickups, the IV2MDM captures every nuance of your playing with remarkable definition and natural character. The versatile Ibanez Sonitech preamp features an active three band EQ with a convenient push pull EQ bypass switch for instant passive operation, along with a three position mid frequency selector incorporating the innovative Hexa Mid System. Together, these controls provide an extensive tonal palette that ranges from warm vintage textures to modern, articulate punch, making the bass adaptable to virtually any musical style.

Performance hardware is equally impressive. The MR5S bridge with solid brass saddle pieces maximizes sustain, enhances intonation, and provides outstanding note separation, while the 18 millimeter string spacing offers a comfortable feel for both fingerstyle and slap techniques. A precision bone nut further contributes to tuning stability and resonance, while sleek black hardware completes the instrument's sophisticated aesthetic.

Factory strung with D'Addario EXL165 strings plus a .130 low B and tuned B, E, A, D, and G, the IV2MDM is ready to deliver commanding low end authority with exceptional clarity across the entire frequency spectrum. Weighing 8 pounds 8 ounces, it offers a comfortable balance that makes it well suited for extended rehearsals, recording sessions, and live performances.

The Ibanez IV2MDM includes a premium hardshell case for secure transport and protection. Combining the celebrated craftsmanship of the Ibanez Japan Custom Shop with premium materials, sophisticated electronics, and impeccable attention to detail, this extraordinary five string bass is built to inspire players who demand the very best from their instrument.

Other specifications include:

  • Neck Type MDM5S-TECH WOOD Roasted Maple neck
  • Top/Back/Body Black Limba top Alder body
  • Fretboard Cocobolo fretboard Maple dot inlay
  • Fret Medium Stainless Steel Frets/Custom Shop Fret Edge Treatment
  • Number of Frets 24
  • Bridge MR5S Bridge w/ Brass Saddle Pieces
  • String Space 18mm
  • Neck Pickup Delta S5J Neck Pickup (Passive)
  • Bridge Pickup Delta S5J Bridge Pickup (Passive)
  • Equalizer Ibanez Sonitech Preamp 3-band EQ w/EQ Bypass Switch (Push/Pull), 3-way Mid Frequency Switch w/Hexa Mid System
  • Factory Tuning 1G,2D,3A,4E,5B
  • Strings D'Addario® EXL165 + .130
  • String Gauge .045/.065/.085/.105/.130
  • Nut Bone
  • Hardware Color Black
  • Hardshell Case included
  • 8 lbs 8 oz
  • #C262104

For more information about this Ibanez instrument, please contact us.

item.title: Godin A5 Ultra 5-string Fretless Acoustic-electric Bass Guitar - Natural — $2,491
item.description:
$2,491 · Brand New · No Limit Guitar Co

Godin A5 Ultra 5-String Fretless Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar – Natural | No Limit Guitar Co, Idaho Falls

The Godin A5 Ultra is one of the most sonically versatile and thoughtfully engineered 5-string fretless bass guitars available — a semi-acoustic instrument that gives players access to two fundamentally different tonal worlds from a single instrument, switchable and blendable in real time. Built in Canada in 2026, serial number 26315999, and weighing 9.81 lbs. as measured at our store, the A5 Ultra combines a two-chambered Canadian Laurentian Basswood body with a solid spruce top, Hard Rock Maple neck, and Richlite fingerboard for a resonant, acoustically alive playing experience. The Lace Sensor low-profile magnetic pickup delivers a modern, dynamic electric bass voice, while individual LR Baggs saddle transducers in the ebony bridge produce an authentic acoustic double bass character that no standard electric bass pickup can approximate. Two individual output jacks and a combined mix output, a top-mounted preamp with volume, treble, mid, and bass EQ, saturation control, and a Fat Switch mid-low boost — the A5 Ultra is an instrument designed to do what no single-pickup bass can.




Product Overview

The two-voice pickup system is the A5 Ultra's defining design feature and the specification that sets it apart from every conventional bass in its price range. Most acoustic-electric bass guitars offer a single pickup system — either a piezo transducer that emphasizes the acoustic character at the expense of electric bass playability, or a magnetic pickup that provides electric bass response at the expense of acoustic authenticity. The Godin A5 Ultra addresses this directly by including both — the Lace Sensor magnetic pickup provides the punchy, articulate, dynamically controlled electric bass voice suited for modern music, pop, rock, and any application where a tight, defined electric bass character is the goal. The individual LR Baggs saddle transducers capture the acoustic resonance of each string at the bridge contact point, producing the woody, resonant, bloom-and-decay character of an acoustic double bass that a magnetic pickup cannot replicate.

The two-chambered Canadian Laurentian Basswood body is the acoustic foundation that makes the LR Baggs saddle transducer's character worth having — the chambers create genuine acoustic resonance within the body that the piezo pickups can sense and reproduce, rather than simply amplifying the string's mechanical vibration through a solid body. The solid spruce top contributes the tonally responsive, bright, and articulate acoustic character that spruce is prized for in acoustic instrument construction — the same quality that makes spruce the most widely used top wood in acoustic guitar and bass building. Hard Rock Maple neck provides the rigidity and sustain characteristics that a 34" scale 5-string fretless demands under the higher tension of the extended lower range, and the Richlite fingerboard at a 16" radius delivers a smooth, fast, glassy playing surface suited to the expressive slides and vibrato techniques central to fretless bass playing.

The electronics architecture separates the two pickup systems for maximum control flexibility. The Lace Sensor magnetic pickup is controlled by dedicated volume and tone knobs mounted on the side of the body. The LR Baggs saddle transducer system is controlled by the top-mounted custom preamp with ergonomic sliders for volume, treble, mid, and bass EQ — plus a saturation control that adds warmth and tape-like character to the acoustic signal, and a Fat Switch that provides a mid-low boost to reinforce presence and fundamental weight in the acoustic voice. Two individual output jacks allow the magnetic and acoustic signals to be sent to separate amplifiers, effects chains, or mixer channels for fully independent processing, while the combined mix output blends both signals into a single output for simpler rig configurations.

The Graphtech nut, 20:1 machine head ratio tuners, top-mounted thumb rest for comfortable playing position, and ebony bridge complete a specification that reflects Godin's commitment to functional, player-focused design at every detail level.

Ideal For

  • Fretless bass players who want both modern electric bass character and authentic acoustic double bass voice from a single 5-string instrument
  • Jazz, contemporary, and world music bassists who want to access acoustic double bass tonal character in an electric bass instrument format
  • Players who need dual independent outputs for separate electric and acoustic signal routing to different amplifiers, effects chains, or mixer channels
  • Recording bassists who want the authentic acoustic bloom and woody character of LR Baggs saddle transducers alongside the punchy, controlled electric character of a Lace Sensor in a single instrument
  • Bass players in Idaho Falls looking for one of the most versatile and uniquely specified 5-string fretless acoustic-electric basses available — built in Canada to Godin's highest quality standards

Key Features

Two-Voice Pickup System — Lace Sensor and LR Baggs Saddle Transducers
A Lace Sensor low-profile magnetic pickup delivers modern, dynamic electric bass character. Individual LR Baggs saddle transducers produce authentic acoustic double bass warmth and bloom. Each voice is independently controlled and separately output — two instruments in one.

Two-Chambered Semi-Acoustic Body with Solid Spruce Top
Two chambers in the Canadian Laurentian Basswood body create genuine acoustic resonance for the LR Baggs transducers to capture. The solid spruce top adds the tonally responsive, articulate acoustic character that makes the acoustic voice worth having.

Top-Mounted LR Baggs Preamp with Full EQ and Saturation Control
Volume, treble, mid, and bass EQ sliders, a saturation control for added warmth and tape character, and a Fat Switch mid-low boost provide comprehensive acoustic voice shaping from the top-mounted preamp.

Dual Independent Outputs Plus Combined Mix Output
Two individual output jacks send the magnetic and acoustic signals separately for independent amplification and processing, plus a combined mix output for simplified single-output configurations.

Richlite Fretless Fingerboard — 16" Radius
A smooth, glassy Richlite fretless fingerboard at a 16" radius delivers the fast, expressive playing surface suited to the slides, vibrato, and tonal expressiveness central to fretless bass technique.

Hard Rock Maple Neck — 34" Scale, 5-String
Hard Rock Maple provides the rigidity and sustain needed for a 34" scale 5-string fretless configuration under extended lower range string tension, with a 1.825" nut width and 20:1 tuner ratio.

Top-Mounted Thumb Rest
An ergonomic top-mounted thumb rest ensures a comfortable, consistent playing position across the extended range of the 5-string fretless configuration.

What's Included

  • Godin A5 Ultra 5-String Fretless Acoustic-Electric Bass Guitar (Natural)
  • Free standard shipping


Specification Details

Model A5 Ultra Serial Number 26315999 Year Crafted 2026 Made In Canada Weight 9.81 lbs. Strings 5 Frets Fretless Orientation Right-Handed Body Two-Chambered Canadian Laurentian Basswood Top Solid Spruce Color Natural Neck Hard Rock Maple Fingerboard Richlite Fingerboard Radius 16" (406.4mm) Scale Length 34" (863.6mm) Nut Width 1.825" (46.355mm) Nut Type Graphtech Bridge Ebony Magnetic Pickup Lace Sensor Low-Profile Acoustic Pickup Individual LR Baggs Saddle Transducers Electronics Custom LR Baggs Preamp (Volume, Treble, Mid, Bass EQ, Saturation, Fat Switch) Magnetic Controls Volume, Tone (Side-Mounted) Outputs 2× Individual (Electric/Acoustic) + 1× Combined Mix Tuner Ratio 20:1 Thumb Rest Top-Mounted




Get Your Hands on This Godin A5 Ultra Bass Today

The Godin A5 Ultra 5-String Fretless Acoustic-Electric Bass in Natural is available now at No Limit Guitar Co in Idaho Falls. Stop in to experience the two-voice pickup system and dual output routing in person — or reach out online to arrange your purchase. A Canadian-built, two-voice fretless 5-string at this specification level won't pass through Idaho Falls often.

item.title: Jackson X Series Signature David Ellefson Concert Bass CBX V, Laurel Fingerboard, Quicksilver MODEL #: 2916949521 — $829.85
item.description:
$829.85 · Brand New · L.A. Music

Designed in conjunction with one of the founding fathers of thrash metal - highly acclaimed bassist David Ellefson of Megadeth - the Jackson® X Series Signature David Ellefson Concert™ Bass CBX V is a beast of a bass. Bearing his personal touches, packed with enormous Jackson sound and the hyper-fast playability required by the fleet-fingered bassist, this five-string instrument is a force to be reckoned with.

Redesigned ergonomic contours provide the perfect platform for launching a musical assault - the upper contour provides a comfortably stable anchor for pick or fingerstyle playing alike while the lower contour provides perfect balance when propped on a knee. Designed for highly technical lightspeed playing, the 12"-16" compound radius laurel fingerboard flattens out as you move up the neck for increased playing comfort and speedy articulation.

An earth-shaking pair of EMG® HZ40 active humbucking pickups in the neck and bridge positions provide plenty of girth and cut as an active 3-band EQ bolsters their native power, shaping and refining it for maximum impact and versatility. The blend knob allows you to mix the pickups to your taste - add more neck pickup for a touch of warmth, or bring up the bridge pickup for more cut. The Jackson HiMass™ 5-string bridge sharpens your notes' attack for extra punch and clarity, granting enhanced sustain without significantly altering the bass' fundamental tone.

Available in Quicksilver or Satin Black, this low-end leviathan bass proudly displays Jackson's distinctive style; all-black hardware, including everything from the bridge to the Jackson sealed die-cast tuning machines, durable gloss finish, pearloid sharkfin neck inlays, single-ply white neck binding and Jackson's signature pointed 5-in-line headstock along with a silver "Fallout" logo and Ellefson's signature embossed on the truss rod cover.

FEATURES

  • 5-string electric bass guitar; dark rosewood fingerboard
  • Dual EMG HZ40 passive humbucking pickups
  • Onboard active 3-band EQ; volume and pickup blend controls
  • Jackson HiMass bridge and die-cast sealed tuning machines

item.title: Washburn 1000 Series S70 Status made in Japan — $1,252.11
item.description:
$1,252.11 · Excellent · wurst.guitars

In the 1980s, Washburn collaborated with Status to produce Japanese-made instruments based on the celebrated Status designs. Featuring the same distinctive Status hardware, pickups and electronics as the English Status instruments, these basses featured an all-wood construction, resulting in instruments with their own unique character.

This S70 is an exceptionally rigid and responsive bass, yet remains lightweight, compact and remarkably comfortable to play. Its active electronics deliver that unmistakable vintage '80s hi-fi voice: clear, articulate and punchy, with aggressive, woody mids that help it sit perfectly in a mix. Whether played with fingers or a pick, it offers plenty of attack while retaining warmth and definition.

Headless basses from this collaboration have become increasingly sought after, combining Japanese craftsmanship with the unmistakable Status aesthetic and engineering.

Condition: Excellent, fully original, with only light signs of use. The most noticeable marks are a few scratches on the rear of the headpiece and a small nick on the side of the body. The original transparent blue finish has naturally faded towards green over time, and the hardware shows light tarnishing consistent with age. Professionally set up with a low action and a fresh set of Rotosound flatwound strings.

Included: Original hard shell case.

item.title: Squier by Fender Sonic Precision Electric Bass Guitar, Black — $269.99
item.description:
$269.99 · Brand New · Modern Day Music

The Squier Sonic Precision Bass is ready to launch any musical adventure into warp speed, offering iconic Fender style and inspiring tone for players at any stage. This P Bass sports a slim and inviting "C"-shaped neck profile with a narrow 1.5" nut width and a thin, lightweight body for optimal playing comfort while a Squier split single-coil pickup delivers punchy bass tone.

Iconic Precision Bass Style

Rightfully based on Fender's original bass guitar, the Sonic Precision features a resonant poplar body with a slick gloss finish. The Sonic Precision's maple neck and laurel fingerboard allow smooth exploration of all 20 frets, making for enjoyable practice or jam sessions as skills evolve.

Durable and Reliable

The Sonic Precision Bass is plenty reliable and outfitted with durable chrome hardware plus some extra touches like a synthetic bone nut. Without getting deep in technical talk, hardware touches like these are what keep Squier basses one of the top-selling beginner instruments at .

Modern, Versatile Tone

It's a tried-and-true design further enhanced with new refinements including a vintage-inspired, modern-voiced single-coil pickup equipped with powerful ceramic magnets. The Sonic Precision produces a punchy, versatile tone ready for any style.

Beginner-Friendly and Budget-Friendly

With the Squier Sonic Precision Bass, iconic bass guitar tone and a reliable instrument are available at a budget-friendly price. It's tough to find a better bet than a Squier Sonic Precision Bass for beginning bassists!

Features
  • Classic Precision Bass delivers authoritative tone with comfortable modern feel
  • Lightweight poplar body keeps the bass balanced for long rehearsals or gigs
  • Slim C-shaped maple neck supports fast movement and relaxed hand positioning
  • Laurel fingerboard provides smooth feel with controlled, even note response
  • Ceramic split single-coil pickup delivers punchy lows and focused midrange
  • 34" full-scale length provides firm string tension and solid low-end presence
  • 4-saddle hardtail bridge maintains accurate intonation and tuning stability
  • Satin urethane neck finish reduces friction for effortless position shifts
  • Synthetic bone nut promotes consistent tone and reliable string response
  • Durable chrome hardware holds up to regular practice and performance use

The all-new Jackson® X Series Concert™ Bass CBXDX IV M is a highly versatile bass designed for one express purpose - bringing the thunder to your music. Upgraded electronics, classically brutal style and fast, efficient playability make this entry into the lineup a fundamental force to be reckoned with. Perfect for rock or metal - or other styles that demand low, punchy bass - this instrument is an unbelievable value.

This 34"-scale bass pairs a poplar body with a graphite-reinforced neck-through-body design that generates formidable sustain, while the speed maple neck contour, 12"-16" compound radius bound maple fingerboard and 24 jumbo frets make for lightning-fast playability.

The heart of this four-string beast is a Jackson J-style bridge pickup and Jackson P-style neck pickup, mated to an active 3-band EQ circuit for adding punch, cut, rumble or grunt to your sound. A brand-new stylish chrome Jackson Bass Bacher IV string-through hardtail bridge enhances note attack and sustain without altering your carefully crafted tone while the sealed die-cast tuning machines keep the strings in tune, no matter how hard you dig into them.

Up for sale is a Fender Player II MOD Active Jazz Bass V in Dusk finish. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with the original case and the COA.

Gear up and get ready to take your performance to the next level with Player II Modified. Featuring key upgrades for the modern guitarist and bassist, these versatile instruments are designed to handle anything you can throw at them.

The Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass® V is a classic bass with the modern player in mind. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or 1-piece maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. The alder body provides classic Fender punch and is available in a variety of exciting new finishes. The Player II noiseless™ pickups deliver classic Jazz Bass® growl while eliminating unwanted noise while the all-new active preamp with passive tone control and EQ section gives players the perfect tool to dial in their favorite tones. The 5-saddle HiMass™ bridge, tapered-shaft tuners and TUSQ® nut all combine to keep tuning incredibly stable for even the most demanding performances.

Upgrade your arsenal today with the Player II Modified Active Jazz Bass® V.

Features


Modern "C" Neck Profile with 9.5“-Radius Fingerboard and Rolled Edges
New Noiseless™ Jazz Bass® Pickups
New Active Preamp with Passive Tone Control and 3-Band EQ
5-Saddle HiMass™ Bridge
Lightweight Tapered-Shaft Tuning Machines
TUSQ® Nut

Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® V features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.

Features


Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel
Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods
10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots
Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups
Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching
5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners

item.title: Fender Troy Sanders Precision Bass Rosewood Fingerboard Silverburst (L5) (00065) — $1,209
item.description:
$1,209 · Excellent · Franklin Guitar Works

Weight - 9lb 0oz

Up for sale is a Fender Troy Sanders signature bass in silverburst finish. This one came to us in great shape and plays fantastic. The electronics have been play tested and are working as they should. This one may have some very light surface scratching, but it is in overall excellent condition. This one comes with the original case and the COA.

Celebrated for their ferocious live shows and their brutal, profound and enigmatic studio albums, Mastodon are one of the most exciting bands making heavy music today. Gaining commercial and critical acclaim with a sound that continues to evolve over 20 years and 8 full-length releases, the Grammy-award-winning metal heavyweights truly defy categorization.

Troy Sanders behemoth bass playing has anchored the band over the length of their career, grounding Mastodons ever-expanding sonic landscapes in epic, pre-historic heaviness. Flanked by a gruesome drop-tuned guitar-duo, Troy goes from understated support to all-out assault and requires an instrument that can keep up with his relentless attack.

Tough as nails and thick as elephant skin, the Fender Troy Sanders Precision Bass is the next step forward in gnarly, grinding bass tone and high-voltage versatility.

The Troy Sanders Precision Bass is loaded with colossal power and tuned to perfection with Tim Shaw-designed split-coil P Bass and single-coil Jazz Bass pickups, custom-voiced 18V preamp and Fender HiMass vintage bridge. Other key features include an alder body in a mesmerizing Silverburst finish, distinctive chromed control plate, maple neck with custom ‘70s P Bass "C" shape and 9.5"-radius slab rosewood fingerboard with pearloid block inlays and 20 medium jumbo frets.

The headstock is finished in a matching Silverburst with a ‘70s style Fender logo on the front and Sanders' own signature decal on the back, while the neck plate displays a Mastodon “Remission” logo and the inlays feature a custom “Emperor of Sand” icon at the 12th fret. With razor-sharp clarity and titanic muscle, The Fender Troy Sanders Precision Bass brings the crushing power and signature sonic mayhem of Mastodon right to your fingertips.

item.title: Ibanez Iceman ICB720FM Electric Bass Guitar - Cosmic Blue Starburst — $999.95
item.description:
$999.95 · B-Stock · The Guitar Factory

NEW OPEN BOX WITH WARRANTY

AUTHORIZED DEALER

SUPER FAST SAME DAY SHIPPING

Bold swagger, unmistakable silhouette and a voice built to cut through the mix—the Ibanez ICB720FM brings the spirit of the legendary Iceman design to a new generation of bassists. This high-output statement instrument pairs premium tonewoods with pro-grade playability and a distinctly modern sonic character. A flamed maple top adds visual depth and crisp high-end definition, resting on a lightweight okoume body that keeps the bass balanced, comfortable and tonally focused. A fast three-piece maple neck with a panga panga fingerboard delivers a solid, responsive feel that supports confident movement across the entire register, while Nordstrand Big Break pickups supply powerful, authoritative tone shaped by Ibanez Custom Electronics for intuitive control. Anchored by an adjustable MR5S bridge and stage-ready hardware, the ICB720FM delivers unmistakable presence for players who want classic Ibanez attitude with modern muscle.

Flamed Maple Top and Okoume Body for Bright Definition and Focused Punch

The ICB720FM electric bass pairs a flamed maple top with an okoume body to create a tonal foundation that is both articulate and responsive. The maple top enhances brightness and clarity, adding snap to each note, while the okoume body supports a focused low end and solid midrange presence. Lightweight construction helps maintain comfort during longer sets without sacrificing projection or punch. Combined with the sculpted Iceman profile, the body design yields a resonant, well-balanced instrument that looks as bold as it sounds.

Three-Piece Maple Neck With Panga Panga Fingerboard for Stability and Control

A rock-solid three-piece maple neck provides enhanced stability and consistent performance over time, forming a reliable backbone for demanding playing styles. The panga panga fingerboard contributes tight low-end response and articulate mids, along with a crisp, defined top end for precise note separation. Medium frets improve accuracy and control, making fast passages, slides and expressive vibrato feel natural and fluid. Together, this neck and fingerboard combination delivers a confident, connected playing experience across the entire scale.

Nordstrand Big Break Pickups for Powerful, Noise-Free Clarity

Nordstrand Big Break pickups give the ICB720FM bass its commanding sonic character, packing a split-coil design into a streamlined soapbar format. The result is a full-bodied, aggressive tone with the articulation associated with single-coil voices, while maintaining quiet, noise-free operation. Ibanez Custom Electronics with a two-band EQ allow quick shaping of bass and treble for a wide range of styles, from punchy rock and modern metal to articulate groove-driven tones. This electronics package delivers impact, flexibility and precise tonal control.

MR5S Bridge and Schaller S-Locks for Confident Stage Performance

The MR5S bridge enhances playability with adjustable string spacing of ±1.5 mm, allowing players to fine-tune feel to their preferred technique. Its solid construction promotes efficient string-to-body transfer, supporting sustain and consistent note response. Schaller S-Locks strap pins add reliable security for energetic live performance. Together, these hardware elements provide stability, durability and confidence onstage or in rehearsal.

Legendary Iceman Design With a Powerful Modern Bass Voice

The Ibanez ICB720FM electric bass guitar fuses the iconic Iceman silhouette with modern pickup voicing, lightweight construction and fast playability. Its flamed maple top delivers dramatic visual presence, while Nordstrand Big Break pickups supply the punch and clarity needed to cut through dense mixes. Built for players who want bold aesthetics, assertive tone and contemporary performance features, the ICB720FM stands as a refined evolution of a classic Ibanez design.

General

  • Product type: Electric bass guitar
  • Series: Iceman ICB Series

Body

  • Body style: Iceman
  • Top wood: Flamed maple
  • Body wood: Okoume
  • Body finish: Gloss

Neck

  • Neck wood: 3-piece maple
  • Fingerboard wood: Panga Panga

Hardware

  • Bridge: MR5S Mono-rail with adjustable saddles
  • Strap buttons: Schaller S-Locks

Electronics

  • Configuration: HH
  • Bridge: Nordstrand Big Break
  • Neck: Nordstrand Big Break
  • Controls: Ibanez Custom Electronics 2-band EQ

Other

  • Case: Gig bag
  • Orientation: Right handed
  • Number of strings: 4

This guitar is sold as a factory second for a finish chip on the bottom, purely cosmetic. The rest of the guitar is in perfect condition and playing properly.

item.title: Ibanez Bass Workshop EHB600 Electric Bass Guitar - Charred Champagne Burst Matte — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · B-Stock · The Guitar Factory

New Open Box With Warranty

Authorized Ibanez Dealer

Super Fast same Day shipping

The Ibanez EHB600 4-string electric bass guitar fuses a headless design with a sculpted, ergonomic body for maximum comfort and control. Its okoume construction creates a punchy, clear sound, while the contoured edges and slanted back help the instrument rest securely against your body. The 5-piece maple and jatoba neck delivers fast attack and stability, so you can play for hours without fatigue. Built for players who want easy access to upper frets and lightweight balance, the EHB600 makes long practice sessions and standing sets much more comfortable. The headless structure and custom hardware keep tuning solid and setup simple, so you spend less time adjusting and more time playing.

Headless Design Improves Balance and Playing Comfort

The headless construction on this bass removes extra weight at the neck, placing more mass near your hands. This keeps the instrument balanced no matter how you hold it. Players can switch from sitting to standing without changing their technique or posture. The custom Ibanez headpieces allow quick string changes using a hex wrench from the back, making maintenance faster. The design also reduces neck dive, so the body stays in position during long gigs or practice sessions.

Custom Electronics 3-Band EQ Shapes Your Sound

The active 3-band EQ on this instrument uses Ibanez custom electronics to boost or cut bass, mid and treble frequencies. The mid control works on slightly different centers for boost and cut, helping you find modern tones quickly. An EQ bypass switch flips the treble knob into a passive tone control, giving you quick access to a simpler sound. With this system, you can sculpt your signal to fit studio recordings, jam sessions or live shows, achieving a consistent tone at any volume.

MR5HS Bridge Allows Precise String Spacing Adjustments

The MR5HS bridge uses individual saddles that can be moved up to 1.5 mm in either direction. This lets you set your string spacing to match your hand size and technique. Teflon washers on each tuner create a smoother tuning feel and keep your adjustments stable. The bridge transfers vibration directly to the body, increasing sustain and clarity. Setup is straightforward, and players can quickly dial in a setup that feels right for their style.

Okoume Body and Maple/Jatoba Neck Provide Durability

This bass combines an okoume body with a five-piece maple and jatoba neck for long-term reliability. Okoume resists warping and moisture damage, while the multi-piece neck minimizes movement and increases tuning stability. The jatoba fretboard adds a crisp high end, and the rounded body edges protect against dings during travel. These materials help the instrument survive frequent use in rehearsal rooms or on the road.

Player Experience With Ibanez EHB600 Bass

Bassists who want ergonomic design and advanced controls will appreciate the EHB600 model. Its sculpted body, custom EQ and adaptable bridge make playing more comfortable and adjusting tone easier. With these features, you get consistent performance at every rehearsal and gig, helping your sound stand out in any mix.

This guitar is sold as a factory second for a minor blemish near the knobs, very minor and purely cosmetic. The rest of the guitar is in perfect condition and playing properly.

This guitar is sold as a factory second for a tiny blemish on the horn, very minor and purely cosmetic. The rest of the guitar is in perfect condition and playing properly.

item.title: Reverend Sentinel Bass — $1,190
item.description:
$1,190 · Excellent · The Bass Armory

If you’re looking for a more comfortable alternative to full-scale P or P-style basses, this 30” short-scale Reverend Sentinel is a real treat in a striking metallic copper finish!

A fully passive, noise-cancelling P Blade split-coil pickup, paired with a 3-way selector for Bright (bridge), Normal (middle), and Deep (neck) voices, ensures that this 4-string absolutely growls, thumps, and sings. With volume and tone knobs to refine your sound, you’ll feel right at home.

Zero neck dive and impeccable, rock-solid manufacturing make this bass player-friendly and a real contender to costlier boutique instruments. With its korina body, three-piece korina set neck, 21 frets, rosewood fingerboard, block pearloid markers, black side dots, 12" fingerboard radius that allows for low string action, 1.650" nut width, Reverend’s top-load and string-through hi-mass bridge, Hipshot Ultralite Y-key tuners, and body and neck binding, this shorty’s stage and studio-ready!

Factory strings and set-up.

Bass will ship in a teardrop Reverend gig bag with case candy. (Sentinels do not typically include gig bags.) Pristine condition, played at home, and stored in gig bag. Seller is the original owner.

Serial #: 70839

Instrument weight: 7.15 lb (per seller’s digital scale, pictured; bass is listed as 7.13 lb per factory tag, also pictured)

Delivery by UPS standard shipping or local pickup from Union, NJ.

No trades, SALE ONLY. Thank you.

item.description:
$477.35 · Very Good · James's Gear Outlet

2003 Schecter Stiletto Custom-4 Bass – Excellent Condition


Up for sale is a 2003 Schecter Stiletto Custom-4 bass in very good condition. These early-2000s Schecters are well known for their solid build quality, comfortable necks, and powerful tone.


This bass plays great with low action and a fast neck. Electronics work perfectly and it delivers a punchy, versatile sound suitable for rock, metal, funk, or modern styles. Cosmetically it shows only light signs of normal use for its age and has been well cared for.


Features:

• 4-string electric bass

• Neck-through construction

• Active electronics

• Quality Korean-made craftsmanship

• Comfortable slim neck profile

• Great sustain and tone


The bass is fully functional and ready to play. A great option for someone looking for a high-quality instrument without spending new-model prices.

item.description:

Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 – Black Cherry


Excellent playing and sounding Schecter Stiletto Extreme-4 in gorgeous Black Cherry finish. This bass delivers huge low end, fast playability, and killer looks with its quilted maple top and abalone/vector inlays.


Features include:

Very versatile bass that works great for rock, metal, worship, funk, or general gigging. Comfortable thin “C” neck and lots of tonal flexibility from the active electronics.

item.title: Gibson Thunderbird Non Reverse - Glossy Green — $1,559
item.description:
$1,559 · Excellent · Aldo's Gear Depot

Near Mint. Straight Neck. Great Sound!


The Gibson Non-Reverse Thunderbird is a modern reissue of Gibson's rare 1965 "Non-Reverse" Thunderbird design. Unlike the original reverse-body Thunderbird, this version features a more conventional offset body shape that offers improved balance while retaining the Thunderbird's unmistakable punch, sustain, and aggressive tone. It's a versatile bass that excels in rock, blues, indie, and alternative music.

Specifications

  • Body: Solid Mahogany
  • Neck: Mahogany, glued-in (set neck)
  • Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)
  • Fingerboard: Indian Rosewood
  • Radius: 12"
  • Frets: 20 Medium Jumbo
  • Nut: Graph Tech, 1.60" (40.6 mm)
  • Pickups: 2 Gibson Thunderbird humbuckers (Rhythm & Lead)
  • Controls: Individual Volume for each pickup, Master Tone
  • Bridge: 3-Point Adjustable Bridge
  • Tuners: Hipshot Ultralite
  • Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Case: Gibson hardshell case included

Tone

The Non-Reverse Thunderbird delivers:

  • Deep, powerful low end
  • Clear, articulate mids
  • Punchy attack with excellent sustain
  • A wide range of tones thanks to the independent pickup volume controls, allowing precise blending.

This model is a great choice for players who love the classic Thunderbird sound but prefer a body design that many find slightly more comfortable and better balanced than the traditional reverse-body Thunderbird.

item.title: Carvin Lb76P Bass 6 String 2000's - Red quilt — $1,599
item.description:

item.title: Ernie Ball Music Man Stingray 5 Pace Car Blue 2009 — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Very Good · Ian's Storage Bin

This is a limited edition color from 2009. This bass features a beautiful Pace Car Blue finish with gold hardware, striking gold pearl pickguard, HH configuration with 5 way selector switch, and a 3 band Treble, Mid, and Bass EQ. The cosmetic wear on the bass is visible in photos. The only thing wrong with this bass is the chip on the nut on the low B side. This defect is benign in that it does not affect playability and the low B does stay perfectly stable in the nut. The tuning stability of this bass is quite nice. It comes with original HSC, electronics configuration paper, battery changing paper, and Dunlop Straplocks.

item.title: Ibanez SR5506-MHF Prestige SR Electric Bass 6-String - Mocha Flat + Case — $2,957.86
item.description:
$2,957.86 · Brand New · All4music

<style> .product-description-container { font-family: 'Roboto', sans-serif; color: #374151; } .product-description-container h1, .product-description-container h2, .product-description-container h3 { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-weight: 900; } .product-description-container .accent-color { color: #e7284d; } .product-description-container .desc-section { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 2rem; align-items: center; margin: 2rem 0; padding-bottom: 2rem; } .product-description-container .desc-image img { border-radius: 0.75rem; width: 100%; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); } .product-description-container .desc-text h3 { font-size: 1.5rem; line-height: 2rem; margin-bottom: 0.75rem; } .product-description-container .desc-text p { line-height: 1.75; margin-bottom: 1rem; } .product-description-container .divider { height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #e7284d, transparent); margin: 2rem 0; border: none; } .product-description-container .text-center { text-align: center; } .product-description-container .mb-16 { margin-bottom: 4rem; } .product-description-container .text-5xl { font-size: 3rem; } .product-description-container .text-2xl { font-size: 1.5rem; } .product-description-container .text-gray-500 { color: #6b7280; } .product-description-container .mt-2 { margin-top: 0.5rem; } .product-description-container .max-w-3xl { max-width: 48rem; } .product-description-container .mx-auto { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } .product-description-container .mt-6 { margin-top: 1.5rem; } .product-description-container .text-lg { font-size: 1.125rem; } </style> <div class="product-description-container"> <section class="text-center mb-16"> <h1 class="text-5xl">SR5506</h1> <h2 class="text-2xl text-gray-500 mt-2">SR Prestige</h2> <p class="max-w-3xl mx-auto mt-6 text-lg">Made in Japan</p> </section> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Atlas HP 5pc S-TECH WOOD Roasted Maple/Walnut neck" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Atlas HP 5pc S-TECH WOOD Roasted Maple/Walnut neck</h3> <p>The Atlas HP 5pc S-TECH WOOD Roasted Maple/Walnut neck offers a balanced note attack and a rich sustain. The special S-TECH roasting process enhances the wood's stability, durability, water resistance, and tolerance to temperature fluctuations.</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Rosewood fretboard</h3> <p>Rosewood fretboard provides a well-balanced solid tone with a focused mid range.</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Rosewood fretboard" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Medium frets with Prestige fret edge treatment" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Medium frets with Prestige fret edge treatment</h3> <p>Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. Prestige Fret Edge Treatment guarantees effortlessly fast playing.</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Ovangkol top / African Mahogany body</h3> <p>The Ovangkol top with African Mahogany body provides a warm tone with rich resonance.</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Ovangkol top / African Mahogany body" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Nordstrand™ Big Single pickups with wood cover" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Nordstrand™ Big Single pickups with wood cover</h3> <p>Nordstrand™ "Big Single" cram a meaty a single coil into a soapbar-style pickup, producing a full-bodied, powerful, aggressive tonal texture, while still retaining the clarity that's characteristic of single coil pickups. The pickups' beautiful wood cover imbues this bass guitar with an exotic appearance.</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Ibanez Sonitech Preamp 3-band EQ w/EQ bypass switch (push/pull)</h3> <p>The Ibanez Sonitech Preamp boasts a meticulously tuned tonal character across the entire frequency spectrum. This circuit offers two selectable 3-band mid-range banks and a passive tone control for unparalleled versatility. Crafted in Japan with premium components, this preamp is designed to deliver maximum flexibility and ease of use. The EQ bypass switch (push/pull) switches between EQ bypass (Pull) or EQ on (Push).</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Ibanez Sonitech Preamp 3-band EQ w/EQ bypass switch (push/pull)" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Gotoh® machine heads" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Gotoh® machine heads</h3> <p>Gotoh® machine heads provide superior precision, a smooth feel, and excellent tuning accuracy.</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>MR5S bridge</h3> <p>The MR5S bridge has adjustable saddles for variable string spacing by +/ 1.5mm, answering every bassist's specific string spacing needs.</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="MR5S bridge" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="3-way Mid frequency switch w/Hexa Mid system" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>3-way Mid frequency switch w/Hexa Mid system</h3> <p>The Hexa Mid system offers players the flexibility to choose from two mid-range banks, each containing three distinct frequency points, for a total of six. Its exceptional versatility and user-friendly interface help players achieve their ideal bass sound.</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Luminlay side dots</h3> <p>The Luminlay side dot position marks make it easy for players to see fretboard position marks when performing on dark stages.</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Luminlay side dots" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Neck Dimensions" loading="lazy"> </div> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Neck Dimensions</h3> <p>Scale : 864mm//34"</p> <p>Width at NUT (a): 54mm</p> <p>Width at 24F (b): 83mm</p> <p>Thickness at 1F (c): 19.5mm</p> <p>Thickness at 12F (d): 23mm</p> <p>Radius : 500mmR</p> </div> </section> <div class="divider"></div> <section class="desc-section"> <div class="desc-text"> <h3>Controls</h3> <p>When holding the bass in the playing position, the Hexa Mid System switch is located on the control cavity cover on the back of the bass. Setting the switch to the up position activates the "H" or high bank, while the down position selects the "L" or low bank.</p> <p>The mini switch on the front of the body is a 3-way mid frequency selector. When the Hexa Mid System is set to the H bank, the mid boost peak is at 350Hz in the neck position, 600Hz in the center position, and 1kHz in the bridge position. In the L bank, the mid boost peak is at 250Hz in the neck position, 450Hz in the center position, and 850Hz in the bridge position. Two knobs are located near the mini-switch towards the neck.</p> <p>The knob closest to the mini toggle switch is the blend knob, and the knob towards the neck is the volume knob. Along the lower edge of the body, four knobs control the treble boost/cut, mid boost/cut, bass boost/cut, and master passive tone.</p> <p>A push/pull EQ bypass switch is incorporated into the master tone knob.</p> <p>When the master tone knob is pulled up, the EQ bypass is activated.</p> </div> <div class="desc-image"> <img src="" alt="Controls" loading="lazy"> </div> </section> </div>

item.title: Fender 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass - Diamond Dust Sparkle with Rosewood Fingerboard - NEW — $1,099.99
item.description:
$1,099.99 · Brand New · FLORES MUSIC

Fender 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass - Diamond Dust Sparkle with Rosewood Fingerboard

Brand New !


Features:

  • Limited-edition Player II Precision Bass with custom large-flake Diamond Dust Sparkle finish celebrates the Diamond Anniversary
  • Classic P Bass construction refined for modern playability and performance
  • Alder body provides traditional tonal balance and familiar contours
  • Modern C maple neck and rolled fingerboard enhance playability
  • 75th Anniversary Thunderbolt pickup delivers rich tone with powerful punch
  • 4-saddle bridge with single-groove steel "barrel" saddles for added stability and intonation support
  • Fender standard open-gear tuners provide a smooth feel and vintage look


Tech Specs

  • Model:Player II Precision
  • Special Release:75th Anniversary
  • Number of Strings:4
  • Left-/Right-handed:Right-handed

  • Neck Material:Maple

  • Controls:1 x Volume, 1 x Tone

  • Case/Gig Bag:Gig Bag

item.title: Fender Mark Hoppus Jag Hot Pink — $1,250
item.description:
$1,250 · Good · In The Attic Gear

1 of 300 made this is a great Hot Pink take on Mark Hoppus’ newest Jag signature bass from Fender. Quarter pounder pickup and Dunlop Locking tuners on this and it’s ready to rock. Comes with the original gig bag with the Mark Octopus logo and the original fender strap locks. I’ve tried over and over and I just can’t get into the Jaguar body shape so my loss is your gain. Thanks!
